mapper.sql: id, domain, short_uri, full_short_url, origin_url, gid, favicon, enable_status, created_type, valid_date_type, valid_date, `description`, total_pv, total_uv, total_uip, create_time, update_time, del_flag, last_access_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_link WHERE gid = #{gid} AND del_flag = 0 AND enable_status = 0 AND (last_access_time < #{todayStart} OR last_access_time IS NULL) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}

SELECT
FROM t_link t WHERE t.gid = #{gid} AND t.enable_status = 0 AND t.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY t.total_pv DESC
ORDER BY t.total_uv DESC
ORDER BY t.total_uip DESC
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT , 0 AS todayPv, 0 AS todayUv, 0 AS todayUip FROM t_link t WHERE t.enable_status IN (1, 2) AND t.del_flag = 0
AND t.gid IN
#{gid}
ORDER BY t.total_pv DESC
ORDER BY t.total_uv DESC
ORDER BY t.total_uip DESC
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
